title: 085  Students should score better in Krishna consciousness
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: Then Prabhupada here mentions a very important point that without the sanction of the Lord,
not a blade of grass moves.
So many times when this statement is made, then people say that if without sanction of
God nothing moves, then why we have to work?
A student may think, why I have to study?
If Krishna sanctions, then I will pass.
Without Krishna sanction, what is the use of studying?
If it is already written that I should not pass, if Krishna is already sanctioned, then
why go to college?
Waste my time, waste Lord's time also.
See, these are all kind of things which an immature person with immature understanding,
we can come to these kind of conclusions.
Many times we find this.
When people initially come to this conclusion, they come to this conclusion.
When people initially come to Krishna Consciousness, students, they start, the grade starts
coming down.
And then many times parents become, again, see he was so studious, he was so nice, he
used to go to movies, now what has happened to him, we don't know.
Even in exams he is not getting good marks.
Again it is not because of Krishna Consciousness.
In fact, if you become Krishna Consciousness, you will do well.
Because outside people are so distracted, their senses are out of control, their mind
is not in control.
Their intelligence is bewildered.
So actually if we are Krishna Consciousness, we will be very, very focused.
Our senses will be in control, our mind will be in our control, our intelligence will be
sharp.
So there is no reason why we will not do well, even in our material life.
But many times we have very immature understanding, a wrong understanding of these principles
which I mentioned.
So when it says not a blade of grass moves without Krishna's sanction, doesn't mean that
everything Lord has decided, everything Lord is doing, and whether we act or we don't
act, it is all the same.
Many times people say, if everything is decided, why do I have to work?
So the answer is, Krishna says we have to do our duty.
So, Krishna says, I will depend on Allah.
I will do my duty myself.
I will have to take care of the energía.
Even if you have a big bank balance, crore of rupees in the bank, still you have to do the duty of writing the cheque, going to the bank and drawing the money.
So it's a fact that not a blade of grass moves without Krishna's sanction, but Krishna has given us a free will choice.
Even after speaking the whole Bhagavad Gita, Krishna did not force Arjuna to fight.
He says, kharishyae vacanam tawa. He says, yatha iccha sita tha karo. Now you decide what you have to do.
So there is an element of free will, there is an element of choice which we have to exercise, there is an element of karma which we can do.
But the fact is that even if we do efforts, even if we put our best of efforts, even if we go to the best of doctors,
if Krishna does not sanction, it will have no effect.
Which means to say,
if after that,
After putting the best of our efforts, after doing our duty, if I don't get the result, if I don't pass the exam, then I can say it's Krishna's wish, it's Krishna's sanction, it's my destiny.
But not without putting the effort.
